rationale: C22 dashboard was ghost code (status claimed done but code never pushed). Implemented for real: faction dashboard with 5 CRT-styled ProgressBars, tier letters, Anam/Runes counters. Wired BiomeRadial into _on_partir_pressed() — was hardcoded to foret_broceliande, now opens the radial selector so players can choose any of 8 biomes (with maturity gating). Added biome_key passthrough in BroceliandeForest3D: reads from MerlinStore.run.current_biome. Code review caught 2 bugs: missing initial _layout_all() (CRITICAL) and := type inference (HIGH), both fixed before push.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C24: verify dashboard updates live when reputation_changed fires during a run (test _update_dashboard with rep values 0/20/50/80/100). Verify BiomeRadial open/close lifecycle when PARTIR pressed twice rapidly. Verify BroceliandeForest3D biome_key passthrough works with BiomeWalkConfigs for non-broceliande biomes (may need config entries for other biomes). Feature: consider adding biome-specific mission display in dashboard or radial tooltip.
